name: Professional Deep Cleaning
description: Complete deep cleaning of your entire home using eco-friendly products and professional equipment.

packages.name: Basic
packages.details: 2 BHK - 3 rooms, Living, Kitchen, 1 Bathroom

packages.name: Standard
packages.details: 3 BHK - All rooms, Living, Kitchen, 2 Bathrooms, Balcony

packages.name: Premium
packages.details: 4 BHK - All rooms, Living, Kitchen, 3 Bathrooms, Balcony, Store

faqs.q: How long does deep cleaning take?
faqs.a: Typically 4-8 hours depending on home size.

faqs.q: Do I need to be home?
faqs.a: Not necessary, we can coordinate key access.

name: Kitchen Deep Cleaning

packages.name: Standard
packages.details: Full kitchen - Cabinets interior, appliances, chimney, floor

packages.name: Premium
packages.details: Complete kitchen + pantry + store room cleaning

faqs.q: Do you clean inside the refrigerator?
faqs.a: Yes, Premium package includes refrigerator cleaning.
